message:
style(atc): rustfmt push_reservation_event insert call

Collapse the multi-line HashMap::insert into the single-line form
rustfmt prefers when the combined expression still fits within the
project's line-width budget. Pure formatting change — identical
runtime behavior; the insert still conditionally records the
reservation event's (kind, timestamp_micros) tuple keyed on agent
for any non-Granted outcome.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
